## Type of change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Documentation checklist

If your change affects any of the following, update the corresponding documentation:

- [ ] **API endpoints** — update `docs/api/*.md` with new/changed endpoints, request/response schemas
- [ ] **Environment variables** — update `docs/deployment/overview.md` and `.env.example`
- [ ] **Authentication or security behavior** — update `docs/authentication/flows.md` and `docs/security/overview.md`
- [ ] **Database migrations** — ensure migration is documented inline with SQL comments
- [ ] **Architecture or module boundaries** — update `docs/overview/architecture.md`
- [ ] **Integration patterns** — update `docs/integration-guides/getting-started.md`
- [ ] N/A — this PR does not affect documented behavior

## Testing checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual testing performed (if applicable)
